---
title: 'Day ONE'
date: '2010-01-11T19:24:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7175974182127861168'
blogger_filename: '/2010/01/day-one.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

Day One, Fast or Feast... Today I'm going to praise God that He always provides and in the meantime I'm going to eat pretzle sticks that have been at my desk a few days now and post on my blogs. God is SO good!<br />
<br />
Darrell Wolfe
